headlines.title: Defense industry leaders preparing to meet with Trump as worries grow over missile supply, sources say
headlines.description: Defense industry leaders have been preparing to meet with President Donald Trump at the White House later this week over missiles.

headlines.title: Brad Lander stands trial in New York over September arrest at ICE facility
headlines.description: Brad Lander is set to stand trial in a federal courthouse in the city starting Wednesday over an arrest in September that occurred while the then-New York City comptroller was protesting conditions at an immigration holding facility.

headlines.title: Trump says ‘I love the inflation’ as Iran war continues to spike prices
headlines.description: NBC News Correspondents Monica Alba, Courtney Kube and Brian Cheung join Meet the Press NOW to report on recent developments in the war with Iran after the President Trump vowed to attack the country “hard” again while inflation jumps to its highest point since 2023.

headlines.title: Trump voices support for Sen. Collins and calls Platner 'a thug'
headlines.description: When asked about the Senate race in Maine, President Trump said he supports Sen. Susan Collins because she is "a sane person" and criticized the Democratic candidate Graham Platner as "a thug."

headlines.title: What Are Graham Platner's Chances of Unseating Susan Collins?
headlines.description: NBC News is projecting Democrat Graham Planter will face incumbent Republican Susan Collins in Maine's Senate race in November. Meanwhile, Republican Steve Hilton is projected to face off against former Biden cabinet secretary Xavier Becerra in the race for California governor. NBC’s Ryan Nobles reports for TODAY.

headlines.title: State Assemblyman Alex Bores speaks on AI and politics
headlines.description: State Assemblyman Alex Bores, a candidate for New York's 12th Congressional District, speaks with NBC News’ Gadi Schwartz about why some top artificial intelligence companies are opposing his candidacy and whether AI should play a role in politics.

headlines.title: Democrats await ranked choice vote in Maine to decide key House nominee
headlines.description: Republicans want to flip a pro-Trump, Democratic-held House seat as part of their plans to hold onto their slim majority in the House.

headlines.title: Map: How much you pay in federal and state gas taxes
headlines.description: As national gas price averages head toward $5 per gallon, one state has already suspended its gas tax, and now President Donald Trump and his Cabinet are talking about doing the same.

headlines.title: Before arrest with 303 gold bars, CIA officer spun tale he was Top Gun fighter pilot
headlines.description: David Rush’s former firefighter colleagues looked up to him as an ace pilot. Now they wonder whether he was making it all up “like Leonardo DiCaprio in ‘Catch Me If You Can.’”

headlines.title: Republican Gov. Joe Lombardo to face off against Democrat Aaron Ford in Nevada’s race for governor
headlines.description: Nevada Republican Gov. Joe Lombardo and Democrat Aaron Ford have won their primaries, NBC News projects, officially setting up what’s expected to be one of the most competitive gubernatorial contests in the fall

headlines.title: Maine voters set up a Senate showdown: Graham Platner versus Susan Collins
headlines.description: Graham Platner and Susan Collins handily won their party nominations in Tuesday’s primary, setting up a marquee race with unique dynamics and major implications for control of the Senate.

headlines.title: Maine’s race for governor heads to ranked choice tallies in both primaries
headlines.description: Democratic Gov. Janet Mills is barred by term limits from running again, leading to a wide-open race.
